headline: Could Buying This Beaten-Down Healthcare Stock Make You Rich If It Recovers?
summary: Pfizer is an innovative pharmaceutical giant that investors have given up on, which is an opportunity if you think long-term.

headline: Here is Why Pfizer (PFE) One of the Best High Volume Stocks to Invest In
summary: Pfizer Inc. (NYSE:PFE) is one of the best high volume stocks to invest in according to hedge funds. On May 5, Pfizer reported a strong start to 2026, achieving Q1 revenues of $14.5 billion, which represents a 2% operational increase compared to the prior-year period. This growth was driven by a 22% operational revenue surge […]
